scripts.build: npm run build -w @talenttic/qa-runner-core && npm run build -w @talenttic/qa-runner-ui && npm run build -w @talenttic/qa-runner-daemon && npm run build -w @talenttic/qa-runner-cli && npm run build -w @talenttic/qa-runner-cloud
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run test -w @talenttic/qa-runner-core && npm run test:run -w @talenttic/qa-runner-ui && changeset publish
